title: OmniProject settings preset
description: A known-good settings blueprint for a customer archetype: a partial settings posture an operator loads in setup and then tweaks. The `settings` payload is validated against the live cross-field constraint registry by the api-server test, not this schema. One file per preset under assets/settings-presets/<id>.json.

settings.description: A partial settings posture (deploymentProfile, reportingCurrency, fxRatePolicy, priorityWeights, disabledFeatures, …). Typed as Partial<SettingsState> at the api-server boundary; arbitrary keys allowed here.
